title: Stage 4 (sub) — user's answers to a refinement round
description: Companion to funnel_stage_4_refinement_v1.schema.json. The atlas UI assembles this from the user's clicks/typing, then feeds it back into the funnel — the resolver re-runs stage 3 (or only the affected mappings) with the disambiguated values folded in.

answers.description: Map of question_id → answer. Keys must match the questions emitted by the matching refinement_v1 round.

skipped.description: question_ids the user explicitly skipped (vs. answered as empty string). Resolver uses the default if any; else marks the corresponding mapping as low-confidence.
